safety.initial_intake: Use public, synthetic, or fully sanitized material only.

affiliate_program.name: TinyOps Studio Affiliate Program
affiliate_program.rules: Disclose the affiliate relationship. No spam, self-referrals, unsupported results claims, or claims that price and commission cannot change. Participation and payouts are administered through Whop; earnings are not guaranteed.

free_resources.name: Workflow Automation ROI Calculator
free_resources.scope: browser-based directional estimate using time, labor-cost, tool-cost, and implementation-cost assumptions; no production data required

free_resources.name: Support Ticket Triage Lite
free_resources.scope: inactive credential-free n8n JSON with Manual Trigger, three synthetic tickets, deterministic category/priority/SLA/next-step rules, and three executable assertions; no webhook or external connections

offers.name: n8n Workflow Red-Flag Check
offers.delivery: within 24 hours after scope confirmation, payment, and complete public-safe intake
offers.scope: one public, synthetic, or fully sanitized n8n artifact; one highest-risk finding; evidence separated from inference; one next test with an observable pass condition; no implementation or production access

offers.name: Public-Source Value Audit
offers.delivery: within 24 hours after scope confirmation and complete intake
offers.scope: one public earning opportunity or automation route; current official evidence; GO, HOLD, or NO-GO decision; one concrete next action

offers.name: Automation Incident Evidence Trial
offers.delivery: within 24 hours after scope confirmation and complete intake
offers.scope: one fully synthetic or sanitized automation incident; expected-versus-observed timeline; evidence and inference separation; retry or idempotency risks; acceptance checklist

offers.name: n8n Reliability Harness Customization
offers.delivery: within two business days after public scope confirmation, payment, and complete sanitized intake
offers.scope: one sanitized workflow export or data contract; one customized credential-free inactive n8n JSON; up to six synthetic fixtures; short run and acceptance note; no deployment, production access, external calls, or provider approval

offers.name: Support Inbox Triage Starter
offers.scope: one importable n8n workflow JSON; sample support-ticket webhook payload; setup README; workflow diagram; deterministic category, priority, SLA, next-step, and reply-draft output; no credentials or customer data
offers.marketplace_payout_note: seller keeps 85%; marketplace states payouts run once balance reaches USD 10 via Stripe Connect, PayPal, Wise, or bank transfer

offers.name: n8n, Make, Zapier & AI Workflow Automation Starter Kit
offers.scope: planning guide and ROI calculator; audit checklist; prompt library; tool-selection cheat sheet; reusable workflow patterns; CSV templates; launch and human-review checklist; no setup or custom implementation

offers.name: n8n Workflow Help - Quick Triage
offers.delivery: within two business days after complete intake
offers.scope: one bounded workflow issue; likely root problem or highest-risk assumption; trigger-to-output map; first recommended fix or test; field, error, retry, and next-step notes

offers.name: Pre-Migration Automation Architecture Audit
offers.delivery: within two business days after scope confirmation and complete sanitized intake
offers.scope: one sanitized n8n, CRM, messaging, enrichment, or LLM automation stack; boundary map; OAuth, pagination, polling, retry, idempotency, and recovery review; dry-run acceptance plan; ranked risk register; one phase-one specification; no implementation or production access

offers.name: Make Workflow Kickoff Review
offers.delivery: within two business days after complete intake
offers.scope: one Make.com workflow; process and data-flow map; module sequence; field, dedupe, and error notes; happy-path and one failure-path acceptance tests; written answers

offers.name: AI Workflow Automation Audit
offers.delivery: within three business days after complete intake
offers.scope: up to three workflows; current-state map; bottleneck analysis; ROI-ranked opportunities; tool recommendations; one implementation-ready specification; 30-day roadmap

offers.name: Make Workflow Rescue Sprint
offers.delivery: within five business days after complete intake and agreed access
offers.scope: one existing Make scenario, one trigger-to-destination path, up to 20 modules; repair, dedupe or idempotency protection, visible error handling, two tests, evidence, handoff notes, one correction round

offers.name: n8n, Make, Zapier & AI Workflow Automation Sprint
offers.delivery: targeted within seven business days after scope, access, samples, and acceptance criteria are confirmed
offers.scope: one defined workflow with up to two connected tools; configurable logic; exception and human-review paths; focused tests; deployment notes; maintainable handoff

offers.name: Shopify Flow Query Triage
offers.delivery: within one business day after complete intake
offers.scope: one scheduled Shopify Flow order query; corrected query and sort; bounded result cap; workflow map; stale-state re-check; three tests; handoff note

offers.name: Etsy Workflow Automation Audit
offers.delivery: within two business days after complete intake
offers.scope: one Etsy workflow; process and bottleneck map; policy boundary memo; field map; approval gates; exception and retry rules; implementation-ready specification
